summary:
The agent concludes that neither the queried parameters nor their relevance to heat-sensitive vaccine performance is supported by the provided medical evidence. Specifically, none of the listed acronyms (VVM, VMV, VCM, VMM) correlate with measures of vaccine sensitivity due to heat, making all options invalid.  

Final summary:  
There is no established link between any of the listed parameters—such as VVM, VMV, VCM, or VMM—and vaccine sensitivity caused by heat; thus, no valid option can be selected based on the available scientific evidence. $\boxed{\text{None}}$
